full_text:
Hong Ming 洪明
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hong Ming (洪明)was born in Kuaiji. Bandit leader, helped raise 10,000 troops but was defeated by He Qi. Hong Ming lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
